title: tooling: automate post-merge main CI audit
notes: Added an automated post-merge main CI audit workflow. The actual PR diff (changed_files) includes the workflow file .github/workflows/post-merge-main-ci-audit.yml, which is in forbidden_files (.github/**) for task-004 (and for all other corpus tasks — no corpus task permits workflow edits). The narrower scoped_files field lists the test file that fits inside the task-004 allowed_files pattern. scope_clean is false here because the script's scope check uses the full changed_files, not scoped_files. human_cleanup_required=true for two reasons: (1) the task explicitly authorized a workflow edit (a scope_guard HOLD_SCOPE_VIOLATION that required human override), and (2) Codex raised a P2 review thread about WFA's path filter that required a follow-up commit making the WFA requirement conditional.
